description: Create the TypeScript bridge (runner.ts) that connects the polyglot scripts to the Next.js app, and update the README.md to document the new polyglot architecture. The runner.ts will attempt to call Python/Shell scripts via child_process and fall back to the existing TypeScript guard implementation when scripts are unavailable.
steps: Create src/lib/agent-guard/runner.ts - TypeScript bridge that: (1) Imports existing TS guard functions as fallback. (2) Provides runGuardInput(input, config) that tries to call 'python3 scripts/guard/scan-input.py' via child_process.execSync with JSON stdin, parses JSON stdout result, falls back to TS sanitizeInput if Python unavailable or errors. (3) Provides runGuardOutput(output, config) that tries to call 'bash scripts/guard/validate-output.sh' with input via stdin, parses JSON stdout, falls back to TS validateOutput. (4) Provides runKnowledgeAudit(content) that tries Python audit-knowledge.py, falls back to TS auditKnowledgeContent. (5) Provides runSkillScan(filePath) that calls bash scan-skill.sh. (6) Loads YAML policies from scripts/guard/policies/ using a simple YAML parser (or reads them as structured text). (7) All functions return the same typed interfaces (SanitizeResult, ValidationResult, AuditResult). (8) Exports a isPolyglotAvailable() function that checks if python3 and bash are accessible. Use path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../scripts/guard/...') or process.cwd() based resolution for script paths.

Update src/lib/agent-guard/index.ts to also export the runner functions (runGuardInput, runGuardOutput, runKnowledgeAudit, runSkillScan, isPolyglotAvailable) from './runner'. Keep all existing exports intact.

Update the README.md 'Keamanan Agent (Agent Guard)' section to document the new polyglot architecture. Add: (1) Architecture diagram showing Python/Shell/YAML/TypeScript layers. (2) Explain how scripts/guard/ directory works. (3) Show standalone usage of scripts for CI/CD. (4) Note the fallback behavior. (5) Keep existing feature table but expand it. Replace only the Agent Guard section, do not touch other sections.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with no errors (TypeScript compiles cleanly with runner.ts)
src/lib/agent-guard/runner.ts exports runGuardInput, runGuardOutput, runKnowledgeAudit, runSkillScan, isPolyglotAvailable
README.md contains updated Agent Guard section with polyglot architecture diagram
Existing guard functionality (processInput, processOutput, etc.) still works unchanged
The runner.ts gracefully handles script-not-found or execution errors by falling back to TS
